title: Mobility Flux
description: Adds unique and inspired mobility items into Minecraft.
body: ## About **Mobility Flux** aims to introduce refreshing and fluid new mobility items into the game, making navigation in your world more enjoyable. Some of the introduced mobility items are familiar, drawing inspiration from other games, while others introduce new concepts. The new mobility methods can aid in: **Building**, **Mining**, **Adventuring**, and even **Combat**. ## New Features ![allay](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1332194/description_c95cc6ac-6737-42c1-8288-65260e89ed4d.png) Allays can now be picked up and stored in your inventory by right-clicking them. Additionally, if you shift-right-click an Allay (or an Allay item), it will mount onto your back and magically carry you, granting you temporary flight (lasting between 30 and 45 seconds). ![player being held by an allay](https://i.imgur.com/6Ra6GKa.png) ![gatecrash](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1332194/description_9acfd828-d70b-4872-84a3-e208292a3c87.png) Based on [Yoru's Gatecrash](https://valorant.fandom.com/wiki/Yoru#Signature) ability from the game Valorant, the Gatecrash is a new item that can be crafted with an Ender Pearl and 8 Lapis Lazuli. It allows you to conveniently teleport/recall yourself to a location. It works from any distance and between dimensions. This can be useful for escaping danger and avoiding the need to walk back and forth in your world between builds. By default, the Gatecrash will continually move forward in the world. However, you can shift-right-click when placing the Gatecrash to prevent it from moving. Gatecrashes are also similar to [Enderpearls](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ender_Pearl#Chunk_loading), in that they load chunks. ![shockwave grenade](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1332194/description_3f073cb7-2a08-4d91-97d2-70f72b024c70.png) Based on [Fortnite's Shockwave Grenade item](https://fortnite.fandom.com/wiki/Shockwave_Grenade), the Shockwave Grenade is a new explosive projectile that deals zero damage but blasts back any mobs caught in its explosion radius. The explosion can be used to travel great distances and clear large gaps. When being blasted by a Shockwave Grenade, you will have immunity to fall damage until you safely land. The Shockwave Grenade can be crafted with Amethyst and Iron Nuggets. ![thermal pearl](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1332194/description_e0946f08-5eed-4c4e-b402-aac052ec717f.png) The Thermal Pearl is a new item that is crafted using a lava bucket and a [Heart of the Sea](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Heart_of_the_Sea). When right-clicked, the Thermal Pearl grants the player Fire Resistance, Haste II, and Speed I, which all last for 10 seconds. This makes it a highly dynamic item that aids in combat, provides a short burst of speed, and allows for the instant mining of certain blocks (when using Efficiency V), making resource gathering faster. ![player inventory containing thermal pearl](https://i.imgur.com/1h9c6Xc.png)
